message.content:
@startuml
actor Administrator

participant ":SpecifyNewVaccineUI" as UI
participant ":SpecifyNewVaccineController" as Controller
participant ":Company" as Company
participant ":VaccineStore" as VaccineStore
participant "vc:Vaccine" as Vaccine
participant "admPro:AdministrationProcess" as AdmPro
participant ":VaccineTypeStore" as VaccineTypeStore
participant ":VaccineType" as VaccineType

Administrator -> UI : 1 starts specifying a new vaccine and its administration process
UI -> Controller : 2 createVaccine()
Controller -> Company : 3 typeList = getVaccineTypeList()
Company -> VaccineTypeStore : 4 getVaccineTypeList()

loop (for all known vaccineTypes)
    VaccineTypeStore -> VaccineType : 5 VaccineType(code,name)
end

VaccineTypeStore --> Company : 
Company --> Controller : 
Controller --> UI : 
UI --> Administrator : 6 request data (name, manufacturer, type, age groups,doses,elapsing interval, dosage) and show vaccineType list
Administrator --> UI : 7 types requested data

UI -> Controller : 8 createVaccine(id,name,manufacturer,type,administrationProcess)
Controller -> Company : 9 createVaccine(id,name,manufacturer,type,administrationProcess)
Company -> VaccineStore : 10 createVaccine(id,name,manufacturer,type,administrationProcess)
VaccineStore -> Vaccine : 11 vc = createVaccine(id,name,manufacturer,type,administrationProcess)

loop (for all age groups)
    Vaccine -> AdmPro : 12 administrationProcess(minAge,maxAge,numberOfDoses,dosage,timeElapsed)
    AdmPro --> Vaccine : 13 validateVaccine()
end

VaccineStore -> Vaccine : 14 validateVaccine(vc)
Vaccine --> VaccineStore :

VaccineStore --> Company :
Company --> Controller :
Controller --> UI :
UI --> Administrator : 15 shows data and request confirmation
Administrator -> UI : 16 confirms data

UI -> Controller : 17 saveVaccine()
Controller -> Company : 18 saveVaccine()
Company -> VaccineStore : 19 saveVaccine()
VaccineStore -> VaccineStore : 20 addVaccine(vc)

VaccineStore --> Company :
Company --> Controller :
Controller --> UI :
UI --> Administrator : 21 informs operation (in)success

@enduml
